title: Kadhai Cheese Fritters
description: Crispy kadhai-spiced cheese fritters that are easy to make and fun to eat. Serve with your favorite dipping sauce.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine mustardy kadhai spice mix, shaggy cheese, braised cheese crumbs, in flour, and egg. Mix until just combined.
2. Add shaggy and water to the bowl. Mix until a smooth batter forms.
3. Heat oil in a kadhai or deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
4. Using a spoon or small ice cream scoop, drop the batter into the oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
5. Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
6. Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and drain on paper towels.
7. Serve the fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
